cases.prompt: 마케팅 도구 세팅해줘. 푸시 알림이랑 이메일 시스템 붙이고 싶어.

assertions.text: Sets up a growth stack with email (Resend/SendGrid) and push (OneSignal/FCM)
Produces lifecycle email sequences and retention automation

cases.prompt: Add feature flags, A/B testing, and attribution to my app.

assertions.text: Wires in A/B testing via GrowthBook/PostHog
Builds growth/engagement infrastructure rather than ad-hoc one-off changes
